TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Lun-tun, title = Lun-tun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lun-tun} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Lun-tun "Ing-a kamu, London, i/'l Ćnd…ôn/" nu Ing-kow a angangan, u satabakiay a tukay nu Ing-kow atu mala kanatal Ing-ke-lan a ce-bu. tini i Tay-u-s a tulil nu sa'wac, i kung-yen 50 a mihcaan u Low-ma ku patizengay, pangangan han Lon-ti-ni-en, itini tusa a se-ci uyni kakitizaan u sakahenulan a mana'nel. Lun-tun a likisi a angangan a kitizaan-Lun-tun a tukay mahizatu cung-se-ci a salaed, u hekal 606.95 katelek ing-li "1,572.0 katelek kung-li"", 2019 a mihcaan u tademaw 898.2 emang, hamin nu Ing-ke-la satabakiay a tukay. makay 19 se-ci malingatu, "Lun-tun" taliyuk sa tuyni angangan a kitizaan patadaas tu liwliwan. uyni a tukay a kitizaan masupu makay 1965 a mihcaan malingatu mala Ta-lun-tun pisakakawan a kitizaan, 32 ku Lun-tun sakaku a tukay cunus Lun-tu tukay a sakaput, Lun-tun kinciw atu Lun-tun i-huy a sakuwan. Lon-tun hamin nu hekal a tukay, i wen-sye,misiwbayay, pasubana'ay, i-le, s-sang, gingku, tanektek mey-ti, sinmung mikawaway, migingkiway atu patadasay, miluwkuay atu saculilad mahiniay mahapinang amin ku kitizaan, namahiza uyza hamin nu hekal angangan aiza ku angangan nu gingku, duduc tu niasipan hamin hekalay a kanatal nisanga'an pulung a aca sakaenem nu tabakiay tukay a kitizaan. Lun-tun sa u angangan hamin nu hekal a lalangawan, henay hamin nu kitakit mizizaway a labang u sakatuuday a tukay, duduc tuniasip tu labang iza hamin nu hekal u sanayay a lawad nu tukay a pahikukian. Lun-tu hamin nu hekal u saayaway a pikaduman, masulup ku katuuday a kitakit nu pacakayay atayni mikadum, nuuzip izaway a nilacul katalakawan tu nu zuma a tukay. Lun-tun iza ku 43 nu talakaway a cacudadan, uyni talakaway pasubana' a sakaput, cedced masaupu i Ow-cow ku satalakaway.2012 a mihcaan, Lon-tun likisian mala u saayaway kinatulu mikawaw tu ayzaay ziday nu kalaludan a Aw-lin-pi-ke a undukay nu tukay. Lun-tun a tademaw atu lalangawan yadah ku mahicahicaay, i Ta-Lun-tun a kitizaan u kamu macaliway tu 300 a lamangan. uyni a kitizaan 2015 a mihcaan cen-bu a nipulungan miasip tu tademaw iza ku 8,673,713, tademaw macalap ku hamin nu Ing-kow tu 12.5%. i 2020 a mihcaan saayaw Ing-kow milaliw tu Ow-mung, Lun-tun a tukay nu Ows-mung nu sakatusa nu tabakiay, duduc tu 2011 a mihcaan tu pikinsa tu tademaw katukuh 9,787,426, Pa-liay dada'.tademaw katukuh 13,614,409, Ta-Lun-tun. tukay a kitizaan u satabakiay nu Ow-co, tademaw katukuh 13,614,409, Ta-Lun-tun cen-bu kamu tukay a kitizaan pulung nu tademaw 2,100 emang. 1831 a mihcaan katukuh 1925 a mihcaan, Lun-tun I kitakit u satabakiay a tukuy. iza ku sepatsiyang kitakit a nilaculan tini i Lun-tun, pasasizuma, u Lun-tun-ta, Ciw-yen, Si-mey-kung, Si-mey-s atu Sen-ma-li-ke-li-te a kiwkay, atu Ke-lin-wi-ce likisi a kitizaan "zuma hungti a luma' piazihan tu demiad tu kalahukan, 0ňö cin-syen atu Ke-lin-wi-ce tatungus ku tuki nu itiniay". zuma singanganay a piazihan pasu Pay-cin-han-kung, Lun-tun mata, Pi-ka-ti-li-yenhwan, Sen-paw-low-cow-tang, Lun-tun-ta-cyaw,Te-la-ba c udes a tupah atu suy-pen-ta-sya. Lun-tun u sayadahay a Pow-u-kwan, hwa-lan-piazihan tu cudan piundukayan atu zuma lalanngawan a sakaput a kitizaan, pasu Ta-Ing pow-u-kwan, kanatal pikulitan, Tay-te ayzaay a nalimaan, Ta-Ing-kow piazihan tu cudad atu 40 ku luma' satipan a piigian. Lun-tun silamalay hekalay nu kasumamadan nu sasaay silamalay a calay. Lun-tun a lalekalan a ngangan caay katiengan. uyni a nngangan i 2 se-ci izaw tu, i kung-yen hakay121 a mihcaan nisulitan u Lun-ti-ni-en "Londinium" pawacay lalekalan u Low-ma-Pu-lye-tyen a hekal. Mung-maw-s a Cye-bo-li i nisulita "Pu-lye-tyen-cu-wang-s" saayaway mitanam palelin tuyni a ngangan, nika uyni a cuyaku imahini caay pala tatenga'en. nipangangan tuyni lalekalan tademaw ci "Le-te-wang King Lud" uyni a tademaw u kamu micalap tuyni a tukuay, pangangan han tu "Kay-al-le-te" "Kaerlud". (Londinium), "ŚčíŚĺ∑Áéč"(King Lud), "(Kaerlud). malalitin tu ihekalaya atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == r~…ĺun-tun "iŇč-a kamu, r~…ĺondon, i/ Ē~ °r~…ĺ*nd…ôn/" nu iŇč-kow a aŇčaŇčan, u satabakiaj a tukaj nu iŇč-kow atu mar~…ĺa kanatar~…ĺ iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺan a ¶…ô-bu. tini i taj-u-s a tur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu sa Ē~ °wa ¶, i kuŇč-j…ôn ** a mińß ¶aan u r~…ĺow-ma ku patiz…ôŇčaj, paŇčaŇčan ńßan r~…ĺon-ti-ni-…ôn, itini tusa a s…ô- ¶i ujni kakitizaan u sakańß…ônur~…ĺan a mana Ē~ °n…ôr~…ĺ. r~…ĺun-tun a r~…ĺikisi a aŇčaŇčan a kitizaan-r~…ĺun-tun a tukaj mańßizatu ¶uŇč-s…ô- ¶i a sar~…ĺa…ôd, u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ ***.** kat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk iŇč-r~…ĺi "*,***.* kat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk kuŇč-r~…ĺi"", **** a mińß ¶aan u tad…ômaw ***.* …ômaŇč, ńßamin nu iŇč-k…ô-r~…ĺa satabakiaj a tukaj. makaj ** s…ô- ¶i mar~…ĺiŇčatu, "r~…ĺun-tun" tar~…ĺijuk sa tujni aŇčaŇčan a kitizaan patadaas tu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwan. ujni a tukaj a kitizaan masupu makaj **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu mar~…ĺa ta-r~…ĺun-tun pisakakawan a kitizaan, ** ku r~…ĺun-tun sakaku a tukaj ¶unus r~…ĺun-tu tukaj a sakaput, r~…ĺun-tun kin ¶iw atu r~…ĺun-tun i-ńßuj a sakuwan. r~…ĺon-tun ńßamin nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a tukaj, i w…ôn-sj…ô,misiwbajaj, pasubana Ē~ °aj, i-r~…ĺ…ô, s-saŇč, giŇčku, tan…ôkt…ôk m…ô-ti, sinmuŇč mikawawaj, migiŇčkiwaj atu patadasaj, mir~…ĺuwkuaj atu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺad mańßiniaj mańßapinaŇč amin ku kitizaan, namańßiza ujza ńßamin nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ aŇčaŇčan aiza ku aŇčaŇčan nu giŇčku, dudu ¶ tu niasipan ńßamin ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a kanatar~…ĺ nisaŇča Ē~ °an pur~…ĺuŇč a a ¶a saka…ôn…ôm nu tabakiaj tukaj a kitizaan. r~…ĺun-tun sa u aŇčaŇčan ńßamin nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, ńß…ônaj ńßamin nu kitakit mizizawaj a r~…ĺabaŇč u sakatuudaj a tukaj, dudu ¶ tuniasip tu r~…ĺabaŇč iza ńßamin nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ u sanajaj a r~…ĺawad nu tukaj a pańßikukian. r~…ĺun-tu ńßamin nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ u saajawaj a pikaduman, masur~…ĺup ku katuudaj a kitakit nu pa ¶akajaj atajni mikadum, nuuzip izawaj a nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ katar~…ĺakawan tu nu zuma a tukaj. r~…ĺun-tun iza ku ** nu tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan, ujni tar~…ĺakawaj pasubana Ē~ ° a sakaput, ¶…ôd ¶…ôd masaupu i ow- ¶ow ku satar~…ĺakawaj.**** a mińß ¶aan, r~…ĺon-tun r~…ĺikisian mar~…ĺa u saajawaj kinatur~…ĺu mikawaw tu ajzaaj zidaj nu kar~…ĺar~…ĺudan a aw-r~…ĺin-pi-k…ô a undukaj nu tukaj. r~…ĺun-tun a tad…ômaw atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan jadańß ku mańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj, i ta-r~…ĺun-tun a kitizaan u kamu ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu *** a r~…ĺamaŇčan. ujni a kitizaan **** a mińß ¶aan ¶…ôn-bu a nipur~…ĺuŇčan miasip tu tad…ômaw iza ku *,***,***, tad…ômaw ma ¶ar~…ĺap ku ńßamin nu iŇč-kow tu **.*%. i **** a mińß ¶aan saajaw iŇč-kow mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw tu ow-muŇč, r~…ĺun-tun a tukaj nu ows-muŇč nu sakatusa nu tabakiaj, dudu ¶ tu **** a mińß ¶aan tu pikinsa tu tad…ômaw katukuńß *,***,***, pa-r~…ĺiaj dada Ē~ °.tad…ômaw katukuńß **,***,***, ta-r~…ĺun-tun. tukaj a kitizaan u satabakiaj nu ow- ¶o, tad…ômaw katukuńß **,***,***, ta-r~…ĺun-tun ¶…ôn-bu kamu tukaj a kitizaan pur~…ĺuŇč nu tad…ômaw *,*** …ômaŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, r~…ĺun-tun i kitakit u satabakiaj a tukuj. iza ku s…ôpatsijaŇč kitakit a nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan tini i r~…ĺun-tun, pasasizuma, u r~…ĺun-tun-ta, ¶iw-j…ôn, si-m…ô-kuŇč, si-m…ô-s atu s…ôn-ma-r~…ĺi-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô a kiwkaj, atu k…ô-r~…ĺin-wi- ¶…ô r~…ĺikisi a kitizaan "zuma ńßuŇčti a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° piazińßan tu d…ômiad tu kar~…ĺańßukan, ** ¶in-sj…ôn atu k…ô-r~…ĺin-wi- ¶…ô tatuŇčus ku tuki nu itiniaj". zuma siŇčaŇčanaj a piazińßan pasu paj- ¶in-ńßan-kuŇč, r~…ĺun-tun mata, pi-ka-ti-r~…ĺi-j…ônńßwan, s…ôn-paw-r~…ĺow- ¶ow-taŇč, r~…ĺun-tun-ta- ¶jaw,t…ô-r~…ĺa-ba ¶ ud…ôs a tupańß atu suj-p…ôn-ta-sja. r~…ĺun-tun u sajadańßaj a pow-u-kwan, ńßwa-r~…ĺan-piazińßan tu ¶udan piundukajan atu zuma r~…ĺar~…ĺanŇčawan a sakaput a kitizaan, pasu ta-iŇč pow-u-kwan, kanatar~…ĺ pikur~…ĺitan, taj-t…ô ajzaaj a nar~…ĺimaan, ta-iŇč-kow piazińßan tu ¶udad atu ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° satipan a piigian. r~…ĺun-tun sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu kasumamadan nu sasaaj sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a ¶ar~…ĺaj. r~…ĺun-tun a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan a ŇčaŇčan ¶aaj kati…ôŇčan. ujni a nŇčaŇčan i * s…ô- ¶i izaw tu, i kuŇč-j…ôn ńßakaj*** a mińß ¶aan nisur~…ĺitan u r~…ĺun-ti-ni-…ôn "r~…ĺondinium" pawa ¶aj r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan u r~…ĺow-ma-pu-r~…ĺj…ô-tj…ôn a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ. muŇč-maw-s a ¶j…ô-bo-r~…ĺi i nisur~…ĺita "pu-r~…ĺj…ô-tj…ôn- ¶u-waŇč-s" saajawaj mitanam par~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺin tujni a ŇčaŇčan, nika ujni a ¶ujaku imańßini ¶aaj par~…ĺa tat…ôŇča Ē~ °…ôn. nipaŇčaŇčan tujni r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan tad…ômaw ¶i "r~…ĺ…ô-t…ô-waŇč kiŇč r~…ĺud" ujni a tad…ômaw u kamu mi ¶ar~…ĺap tujni a tukuaj, paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "kaj-ar~…ĺ-r~…ĺ…ô-t…ô" "ka…ôrr~…ĺud". (r~…ĺondinium), "***"(kiŇč r~…ĺud), "(ka…ôrr~…ĺud). mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaja atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Lun-tun "Ing-a kamu, London, i/'l Ćnd…ôn/" nu Ing-kow a angangan, u satabakiay a tukay nu Ing-kow atu mala kanatal Ing-ke-lan a ce-bu. tini i Tay-u-s a tulil nu sa'wac, i kung-yen 50 a mihcaan u Low-ma ku patizengay, pangangan han Lon-ti-ni-en, itini tusa a se-ci uyni kakitizaan u sakahenulan a mana'nel. Lun-tun a likisi a angangan a kitizaan-Lun-tun a tukay mahizatu cung-se-ci a salaed, u hekal 606.95 katelek ing-li "1,572.0 katelek kung-li"", 2019 a mihcaan u tademaw 898.2 emang, hamin nu Ing-ke-la satabakiay a tukay. makay 19 se-ci malingatu, "Lun-tun" taliyuk sa tuyni angangan a kitizaan patadaas tu liwliwan. uyni a tukay a kitizaan masupu makay 1965 a mihcaan malingatu mala Ta-lun-tun pisakakawan a kitizaan, 32 ku Lun-tun sakaku a tukay cunus Lun-tu tukay a sakaput, Lun-tun kinciw atu Lun-tun i-huy a sakuwan. Lon-tun hamin nu hekal a tukay, i wen-sye,misiwbayay, pasubana'ay, i-le, s-sang, gingku, tanektek mey-ti, sinmung mikawaway, migingkiway atu patadasay, miluwkuay atu saculilad mahiniay mahapinang amin ku kitizaan, namahiza uyza hamin nu hekal angangan aiza ku angangan nu gingku, duduc tu niasipan hamin hekalay a kanatal nisanga'an pulung a aca sakaenem nu tabakiay tukay a kitizaan. Lun-tun sa u angangan hamin nu hekal a lalangawan, henay hamin nu kitakit mizizaway a labang u sakatuuday a tukay, duduc tuniasip tu labang iza hamin nu hekal u sanayay a lawad nu tukay a pahikukian. Lun-tu hamin nu hekal u saayaway a pikaduman, masulup ku katuuday a kitakit nu pacakayay atayni mikadum, nuuzip izaway a nilacul katalakawan tu nu zuma a tukay. Lun-tun iza ku 43 nu talakaway a cacudadan, uyni talakaway pasubana' a sakaput, cedced masaupu i Ow-cow ku satalakaway.2012 a mihcaan, Lon-tun likisian mala u saayaway kinatulu mikawaw tu ayzaay ziday nu kalaludan a Aw-lin-pi-ke a undukay nu tukay. Lun-tun a tademaw atu lalangawan yadah ku mahicahicaay, i Ta-Lun-tun a kitizaan u kamu macaliway tu 300 a lamangan. uyni a kitizaan 2015 a mihcaan cen-bu a nipulungan miasip tu tademaw iza ku 8,673,713, tademaw macalap ku hamin nu Ing-kow tu 12.5%. i 2020 a mihcaan saayaw Ing-kow milaliw tu Ow-mung, Lun-tun a tukay nu Ows-mung nu sakatusa nu tabakiay, duduc tu 2011 a mihcaan tu pikinsa tu tademaw katukuh 9,787,426, Pa-liay dada'.tademaw katukuh 13,614,409, Ta-Lun-tun. tukay a kitizaan u satabakiay nu Ow-co, tademaw katukuh 13,614,409, Ta-Lun-tun cen-bu kamu tukay a kitizaan pulung nu tademaw 2,100 emang. 1831 a mihcaan katukuh 1925 a mihcaan, Lun-tun I kitakit u satabakiay a tukuy. iza ku sepatsiyang kitakit a nilaculan tini i Lun-tun, pasasizuma, u Lun-tun-ta, Ciw-yen, Si-mey-kung, Si-mey-s atu Sen-ma-li-ke-li-te a kiwkay, atu Ke-lin-wi-ce likisi a kitizaan "zuma hungti a luma' piazihan tu demiad tu kalahukan, 0ňö cin-syen atu Ke-lin-wi-ce tatungus ku tuki nu itiniay". zuma singanganay a piazihan pasu Pay-cin-han-kung, Lun-tun mata, Pi-ka-ti-li-yenhwan, Sen-paw-low-cow-tang, Lun-tun-ta-cyaw,Te-la-ba c udes a tupah atu suy-pen-ta-sya. Lun-tun u sayadahay a Pow-u-kwan, hwa-lan-piazihan tu cudan piundukayan atu zuma lalanngawan a sakaput a kitizaan, pasu Ta-Ing pow-u-kwan, kanatal pikulitan, Tay-te ayzaay a nalimaan, Ta-Ing-kow piazihan tu cudad atu 40 ku luma' satipan a piigian. Lun-tun silamalay hekalay nu kasumamadan nu sasaay silamalay a calay. Lun-tun a lalekalan a ngangan caay katiengan. uyni a nngangan i 2 se-ci izaw tu, i kung-yen hakay121 a mihcaan nisulitan u Lun-ti-ni-en "Londinium" pawacay lalekalan u Low-ma-Pu-lye-tyen a hekal. Mung-maw-s a Cye-bo-li i nisulita "Pu-lye-tyen-cu-wang-s" saayaway mitanam palelin tuyni a ngangan, nika uyni a cuyaku imahini caay pala tatenga'en. nipangangan tuyni lalekalan tademaw ci "Le-te-wang King Lud" uyni a tademaw u kamu micalap tuyni a tukuay, pangangan han tu "Kay-al-le-te" "Kaerlud". (Londinium), "ŚčíŚĺ∑Áéč"(King Lud), "(Kaerlud). malalitin tu ihekalaya atu zumaay a natinengan

nisaŇča Ē~ °an pur~…ĺuŇč a a ¶a saka…ôn…ôm nu tabakiaj tukaj a kitizaan. r~…ĺun-tun sa u aŇčaŇčan ńßamin nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, ńß…ônaj ńßamin nu kitakit mizizawaj a r~…ĺabaŇč u sakatuudaj a tukaj, dudu ¶ tuniasip tu r~…ĺabaŇč iza ńßamin nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ u sanajaj a r~…ĺawad nu tukaj a pańßikukian. r~…ĺun-tu ńßamin nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ u saajawaj a pikaduman, masur~…ĺup ku katuudaj a kitakit nu pa ¶akajaj atajni mikadum, nuuzip izawaj a nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ katar~…ĺakawan tu nu zuma a tukaj. r~…ĺun-tun iza ku ** nu tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan, ujni tar~…ĺakawaj pasubana Ē~ ° a sakaput, ¶…ôd ¶…ôd masaupu i ow- ¶ow ku satar~…ĺakawaj.**** a mińß ¶aan, r~…ĺon-tun r~…ĺikisian mar~…ĺa u saajawaj kinatur~…ĺu mikawaw tu ajzaaj zidaj nu kar~…ĺar~…ĺudan a aw-r~…ĺin-pi-k…ô a undukaj nu tukaj. r~…ĺun-tun a tad…ômaw atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan jadańß ku mańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj, i ta-r~…ĺun-tun a kitizaan u kamu ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu *** a r~…ĺamaŇčan. ujni a kitizaan **** a mińß ¶aan ¶…ôn-bu a nipur~…ĺuŇčan miasip tu tad…ômaw iza ku *,***,***, tad…ômaw ma ¶ar~…ĺap ku ńßamin nu iŇč-kow tu **.*%. i **** a mińß ¶aan saajaw iŇč-kow mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw tu ow-muŇč, r~…ĺun-tun a tukaj nu ows-muŇč nu sakatusa nu tabakiaj, dudu ¶ tu **** a mińß ¶aan tu pikinsa tu tad…ômaw katukuńß *,***,***, pa-r~…ĺiaj dada Ē~ °.tad…ômaw katukuńß **,***,***, ta-r~…ĺun-tun. tukaj a kitizaan u satabakiaj nu ow- ¶o, tad…ômaw katukuńß **,***,***, ta-r~…ĺun-tun ¶…ôn-bu kamu tukaj a kitizaan pur~…ĺuŇč nu tad…ômaw *,*** …ômaŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, r~…ĺun-tun i kitakit u satabakiaj a tukuj. iza ku s…ôpatsijaŇč kitakit a nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan tini i r~…ĺun-tun, pasasizuma, u r~…ĺun-tun-ta, ¶iw-j…ôn, si-m…ô-kuŇč, si-m…ô-s atu s…ôn-ma-r~…ĺi-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô a kiwkaj, atu k…ô-r~…ĺin-wi- ¶…ô r~…ĺikisi a kitizaan "zuma ńßuŇčti a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° piazińßan tu d…ômiad tu kar~…ĺańßukan, ** ¶in-sj…ôn atu k…ô-r~…ĺin-wi- ¶…ô tatuŇčus ku tuki nu itiniaj". zuma siŇčaŇčanaj a piazińßan pasu paj- ¶in-ńßan-kuŇč, r~…ĺun-tun mata, pi-ka-ti-r~…ĺi-j…ônńßwan, s…ôn-paw-r~…ĺow- ¶ow-taŇč, r~…ĺun-tun-ta- ¶jaw,t…ô-r~…ĺa-ba ¶ ud…ôs a tupańß atu suj-p…ôn-ta-sja. r~…ĺun-tun u sajadańßaj a pow-u-kwan, ńßwa-r~…ĺan-piazińßan tu ¶udan piundukajan atu zuma r~…ĺar~…ĺanŇčawan a sakaput a kitizaan, pasu ta-iŇč pow-u-kwan, kanatar~…ĺ pikur~…ĺitan, taj-t…ô ajzaaj a nar~…ĺimaan, ta-iŇč-kow piazińßan tu ¶udad atu ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° satipan a piigian. r~…ĺun-tun sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu kasumamadan nu sasaaj sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a ¶ar~…ĺaj. r~…ĺun-tun a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan a ŇčaŇčan ¶aaj kati…ôŇčan. ujni a nŇčaŇčan i * s…ô- ¶i izaw tu, i kuŇč-j…ôn ńßakaj*** a mińß ¶aan nisur~…ĺitan u r~…ĺun-ti-ni-…ôn "r~…ĺondinium" pawa ¶aj r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan u r~…ĺow-ma-pu-r~…ĺj…ô-tj…ôn a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ. muŇč-maw-s a ¶j…ô-bo-r~…ĺi i nisur~…ĺita "pu-r~…ĺj…ô-tj…ôn- ¶u-waŇč-s" saajawaj mitanam par~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺin tujni a ŇčaŇčan, nika ujni a ¶ujaku imańßini ¶aaj par~…ĺa tat…ôŇča Ē~ °…ôn. nipaŇčaŇčan tujni r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan tad…ômaw ¶i "r~…ĺ…ô-t…ô-waŇč kiŇč r~…ĺud" ujni a tad…ômaw u kamu mi ¶ar~…ĺap tujni a tukuaj, paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "kaj-ar~…ĺ-r~…ĺ…ô-t…ô" "ka…ôrr~…ĺud". (r~…ĺondinium), "***"(kiŇč r~…ĺud), "(ka…ôrr~…ĺud). mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaja atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
